title: Nolann's ModPack
description: Nolann's ModPack is a modpack designed to enhance your gaming experience by boosting Minecraft's performance without changing the vanilla mechanics.
body:
![Nolann's ModPack !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/849029c5987277b1b1038cbe3aa27b0ac6c5714c.png)

# Why use Nolann's ModPack?

Nolann's ModPack is a modpack designed to improve the vanilla gaming experience by boosting Minecraft's performance and adding several useful features.

### What are the useful mods/features?

- **Shulker Box Tooltip**: See inside shulker boxes without even placing them on the ground!
- **AdvancementInfo Reloaded**: Get more information about your achievements!
- **Command Keys**: Execute commands with the simple press of a key!
- **Simple Voice Chat**: Talk to your friends in-game with proximity voice chat!
- **Skin Restorer**: Have a skin that can be changed at any time!
- **Zoomify**: Zoom in super far without using a telescope!
- **Xaero's Minimap**: See all the areas you've explored!
- **uku's Armor HUD**: Know when your armor is about to break!
- **Health Indicators**: See the health of other players/creatures!
- **FlashBack**: Record your gaming sessions and relive them whenever you want!
- **No Peeking!**: Hide your password when logging in to multiplayer!
- **Gamma Utils (Fullbright)**: See properly without having to place torches!

# FAQ!

### Which versions is the ModPack available for?

The ModPack is currently supported in 1.21.8 and 1.21.5.

### Where can I report bugs in the ModPack?

It is not yet possible to report bugs to the team.

### Can I become a beta tester?

No, we are not recruiting new beta testers.

### Does the ModPack have a default Texture Pack?

Yes, the ModPack has a Texture Pack created by myself, but it is not enabled by default on the client.

### Are Alpha versions still supported?

No, they will no longer receive any updates.
